mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_task (session_id, agent_id, user_message_id, status, goal, finish_reason, model_name, max_steps, actual_steps, tool_call_count, latency_ms, trace_id, heartbeat_at, started_at, finished_at, updated_at, error_message) VALUES (CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid), CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid), CAST(#{userMessageId} AS uuid), #{status}, #{goal}, #{finishReason}, #{modelName}, #{maxSteps}, #{actualSteps}, #{toolCallCount}, #{latencyMs}, #{traceId}, #{heartbeatAt}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{errorMessage})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, agent_id, user_message_id, status, goal, finish_reason, model_name, max_steps, actual_steps, tool_call_count, latency_ms, trace_id, heartbeat_at, started_at, finished_at, updated_at, error_message FROM agent_task WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update:
UPDATE agent_task
status = #{status}, goal = #{goal}, finish_reason = #{finishReason}, model_name = #{modelName}, max_steps = #{maxSteps}, actual_steps = #{actualSteps}, tool_call_count = #{toolCallCount}, latency_ms = #{latencyMs}, trace_id = #{traceId}, heartbeat_at = #{heartbeatAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, error_message = #{errorMessage},
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, agent_id, user_message_id, status, goal, finish_reason, model_name, max_steps, actual_steps, tool_call_count, latency_ms, trace_id, heartbeat_at, started_at, finished_at, updated_at, error_message FROM agent_task WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND COALESCE(heartbeat_at, updated_at, started_at) < #{staleBefore}
